selections.name: Blabber Mouth
selections.reason: Drawn well in barrier 3, possesses good tactical speed to sit on the pace, and comes off two solid runner-up finishes.

selections.name: Shamastar
selections.reason: Gets the coveted inside draw. Set the pace last start and held on for second. Will be prominent early.

selections.name: Rock Shot
selections.reason: Improving type who finished third last start. Inside barrier is a significant advantage on this tight circuit.

selections.name: Kelorik
selections.reason: Has been racing consistently in similar company and can feature in the exotics with a clean jump.

danger_horse.name: Veloce Girl
danger_horse.reason: Eased back early last start but made some ground. Wide draw is a concern but has ability.

selections.name: Zarubina
selections.reason: Resuming from a spell but gets the ultimate gear change with barrier 1 on a tight track. Showed good form last prep.

selections.name: Platino
selections.reason: Sat on the pace and held ground well for second last start. Tactical speed is a major plus here.

selections.name: Lady Biv
selections.reason: Faded last start but has shown early speed previously. Inside draw gives her a chance to dictate terms.

selections.name: Sir Monica
selections.reason: Tracked the speed steadily last start. Needs some luck from the draw but has the fitness edge.

danger_horse.name: Glitzy Golden Girl
danger_horse.reason: First starter who trialed well recently. Respecting the stable's placement.

selections.name: Goodlookin' Guru
selections.reason: Finished second two starts back and has the tactical speed to overcome the slightly tricky draw.

selections.name: Here She Is
selections.reason: Consistent performer who is working up to a win. Midfield draw allows her to find a good position.

selections.name: Extra Fling
selections.reason: Excellent debut run finishing second, but the wide barrier is a severe penalty on this track. Needs massive luck.

selections.name: Kayla Kruzen
selections.reason: Another with consistent form but cursed by the barrier draw. Will need a masterful ride to cross the field.

danger_horse.name: Polunin
danger_horse.reason: First starter who ran well in a recent trial. Watch the market for confidence.

selections.name: Stagetime
selections.reason: Gets a beautiful inside draw. Has been racing consistently and the track bias heavily favors her starting position.

selections.name: Karma Queen
selections.reason: Another beneficiary of the barrier draw. Should be able to kick up and hold a prominent position on the rail.

selections.name: Hell's On Fire
selections.reason: Held ground well for second last start. The draw is a slight concern but has the class to overcome it.

selections.name: Goldfields Grey
selections.reason: Consistent type but the wide draw is a major negative. Will need to use early energy to find a spot.

danger_horse.name: Patanjali
danger_horse.reason: Third two starts back and has a reasonable draw to work with. Can sneak into the finish.

selections.name: Took Gardner
selections.reason: Excellent debut run finishing second. Draws perfectly in barrier 3 to get a soft run and looks the one to beat.

selections.name: Or Am I
selections.reason: Consistent filly who draws well. Has the tactical speed to utilize the barrier and should be in the finish.

selections.name: Paganini
selections.reason: Has been a consistent runner-up. The wide draw is the only concern, but she has the class to feature.

selections.name: Moussaka (NZ)
selections.reason: Made good ground from midfield last start. Needs a genuine pace to run at but is a solid contender.

danger_horse.name: Vamore (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Form is solid but the wide draw makes it tough. Capable if the breaks go his way.

selections.name: Maldivica
selections.reason: Won well two starts back and gets a prime inside draw. Should be able to dictate terms or sit just off the speed.

selections.name: Havilah
selections.reason: Coming off a strong win last start. Has the tactical speed to utilize the good draw and is a major threat.

selections.name: Chilli Crab
selections.reason: Consistent mare with good recent form. Draws well enough to be competitive in this field.

selections.name: Jewels Captain
selections.reason: Won two starts back but has a slightly tricky draw to navigate. Still commands respect on ability.

danger_horse.name: Miss Sghirripa
danger_horse.reason: Consistent type who won recently. The wide draw is a negative but she cannot be entirely dismissed.

selections.name: United Legend
selections.reason: Won two starts back and finished a close third last time out. The inside draw is a massive advantage on this circuit.

selections.name: Fiorente Spritz
selections.reason: Gets a perfect draw to sit just behind the leaders. Has been placing consistently and looks ready to strike.

selections.name: Bush Inference
selections.reason: Good form recently and draws well. Should get an economical run and be strong late.

selections.name: Red Sparks
selections.reason: Finished third two starts back and has a favorable draw. Can feature in the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Everythingisautumn
danger_horse.reason: Won last start but the wide draw is a significant hurdle. Will need a lot of luck to cross over.

selections.name: Hallstatt
selections.reason: Finished third last start and gets a beautiful inside draw. Should be able to hold a forward position without spending pennies.

selections.name: Dora Aurora
selections.reason: Gets the pole position. Has been racing fairly and the draw brings her right into contention.

selections.name: Morlaix
selections.reason: Very consistent performer who rarely runs a bad race. The draw is slightly tricky but he has the class.

selections.name: Loca Bella
selections.reason: Consistent type but will need to overcome the wide barrier. Capable if she gets a cart across.

danger_horse.name: Chartin (NZ)
danger_horse.reason: Has been runner-up in three of his last five starts. Deserves a win and is a genuine threat.

selections.name: Uncle Barry (NZ)
selections.reason: Excellent form with a win and two seconds in his last three. Barrier 1 is gold on this track. The clear top pick.

selections.name: Fashion Dog
selections.reason: Won recently and draws perfectly to get a soft run. Will be right in the finish.

selections.name: Kiss And Kaboom
selections.reason: Very consistent mare who draws well. Has the tactical speed to be prominent throughout.

selections.name: Zenacity
selections.reason: Gets a great inside draw. Has been racing in tougher company and can improve sharply here.

danger_horse.name: Aloha Blue
danger_horse.reason: Finished second last start. The wide draw is a concern but she has the ability to feature if things go right.
